Home_Para1: Flashpoint Archive 致力於保存全世界的網頁遊戲、動畫及互動式體驗程式。
Home_Para2: The internet and the ways we interact with it are constantly evolving; the web of today might look nothing like it does tomorrow. The death of Adobe Flash put large swathes of internet history and culture at risk of disappearing forever. Since its inception in December 2017, Flashpoint has saved $1{over 200,000 of these experiences} across more than a hundred modern and legacy web technologies including Flash, Shockwave, and HTML5, thanks to the work of community contributors from around the world.
Home_Para3: We provide a highly flexible software package for interacting with the archive, including $1{a fully-featured launcher}, $2{a proxy} that tricks games into thinking they're running on the live internet, and $3{a sandbox} that enables secure playback of plugin-enabled content - $4{all of which are open-source software}.
Home_Para4: Flashpoint 是由 Open Collective Europe 經營的非營利組織，所有的收益都將用於支付伺服器的維護費用。如果您想支援我們，或希望深入了解我們的資金來源與使用情況，請您造訪 $1{our Open Collective page}。
